info.title: CodeGuard - DI Lifecycle Auditor
info.description: A Roslyn-based static analysis tool that audits Dependency Injection service lifecycles in .NET applications. Detects captive dependencies, scope leaks, and recommends lifecycle promotions for improved performance and correctness.

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: console (default), json, sarif, html

options.name: --output
options.description: Write report to file instead of stdout

options.name: --rewrite
options.description: Automatically rewrite registration code with recommendations

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to solution (.sln, .slnx) or project (.csproj) file
